reproducibility: real repositories at pinned SHAs; line-precise; pin-or-drop

seed.sink: MongoDBSaver runs collection.find on thread_id/checkpoint values taken from config.configurable without requiring strings
seed.patched_shape: getStringConfigValue rejects non-string configurable values before any query is built

heldout.sink: password-reset/token paths bind req.body.token into user lookups without requiring a string
heldout.patched_shape: UsersRouter rejects non-string tokens; PagesRouter coerces non-strings via toString

heldout.sink: authData provider id is accepted as any type and used in user matching queries
heldout.patched_shape: typeof providerAuthData.id !== 'string' throws INVALID_VALUE before login lookup

heldout.sink: MongoDB adapter accepts arbitrary objects as document ids for get/patch/remove
heldout.patched_shape: rejects ids that are not string, number, or ObjectId before querying

heldout.drop_reason: security advisory lists no public fix commit SHA at pin time; pin-or-drop
